contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Sentinel surfacing + autopilot clasp/bastion access
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/338
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/192
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/17
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/338
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/339
  
  Details:
  Surfaced DAO "sentinel" agent personas end-to-end and hardened autopilot ops access.
  
  What shipped:
  - Deployed + verified the sentinel role in dao_members.json (treasury-cache):
    fixed the header-row-4 detection, redeployed the identity GAS web-app deployment,
    and triggered the cache refresh. Sophia Truesight + truesight-autopilot now carry
    roles ["member","sentinel"] (400 contributors, 2 sentinels live).
  - Added a dedicated "Sentinels" section to truesight.me/members.html (sourced from
    dao_members.json, since the sentinel personas aren't in the credential index) and
    promoted it to production file-scoped (preserving prod's truesight.me CNAME).
  - Manifest fix: mapped the 3 former files_without_scriptid to scriptId 1m8IZPs1 and
    documented the repo<->project filename divergence that made the script ID look
    "missing" during deploys.
  - Documented bastion-via-Sophia access for the Nelanco hosts (SG source-IP allowlist;
    ssh -J sophia) and clarified dao_protocol as the crown-jewel host in the AWS infra doc.
  - Provisioned clasp on the autopilot box for BOTH Google identities
    (admin@truesight.me + garyjob@agroverse.shop) and documented the swap-before-deploy
    procedure so Sophia can self-deploy GAS.
  
  PRs: tokenomics#338, truesight_me_beta#192, truesight_me_prod#17,
  agentic_ai_context#338, agentic_ai_context#339.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
